title: 年薪200万的「黄金志愿」，不在985
content: A global shift among Gen Z ("Toolbelt Generation") is redirecting youth from university tracks to skilled trades like electrical work, HVAC, and plumbing, driven by AI displacement of entry-level white-collar jobs and soaring university debt. Skilled trade wages are climbing worldwide, with AI infrastructure demand creating premium roles paying $200K+ annually. Vocational schools see surging enrollment globally, while trade influencers reshape career aspirations. However, trade work carries physical demands and injury risks, and economic cycles threaten stability. The movement reflects declining faith in university returns, with many graduates unable to recover education costs within five years.

title: 禁令传出，“光储市值一哥”蒸发 600亿市值
content: Sungrow Power Supply, China's top solar and storage company by market value, saw its stock plunge 13.9% on July 1, wiping out over 60 billion yuan in market capitalization. The drop was triggered by reports that the U.S. is drafting an import ban on foreign-made grid-tied inverters, with potential restrictions expanding from federal projects to commercial and large-scale energy storage nationwide. Sungrow derives over 60% of revenue from overseas sales, with North America being a key high-margin market for its energy storage products. The company has been preparing for trade barriers by building overseas production capacity in Mexico, Hungary, and Thailand, while diversifying into global markets including Africa, the Middle East, and Latin America. The stock had already declined nearly 30% from its 2025 peak due to weaker-than-expected quarterly earnings, as revenue and profit growth slowed with single-quarter profits falling over 40-50% year-over-year

title: 阿里一面，我霸气反问：你说你们在做Agent项目，说说langchain、muti-agent、a2a这些你们都是怎么做的？面试官一直在擦汗。。
content: A candidate interviewed at Alibaba for an Agent engineering role, facing questions on LangChain architecture (three layers: base abstractions, capabilities, applications), four Agent development patterns (ReAct, Plan-and-Execute, Multi-Agent, state graph), LangChain's six core modules (Models, Prompts, Indexes, Memory, Chains, Agents), and their project PaiAgent using LangGraph4j with Spring AI. The discussion covered A2A protocol for Agent-to-Agent communication versus MCP for tool integration, Transformer architecture with Self-Attention mechanism, and model comparisons across text, code, audio, and image generation. title: Codex技术大佬亲自揭秘：做AI产品最后拼的竟然是它？
content: OpenAI Codex product lead Andrew Ambrosino discusses how AI is transforming software development. With Codex usage up 6x to 5 million weekly active users and 90% of OpenAI employees using it, the core bottleneck has shifted from implementation to curation. When implementation costs near zero, "taste"—the judgment to decide what to build, how to integrate ideas, and what users truly need—becomes the scarcest skill. Traditional PRD-driven, waterfall processes are inverting as teams produce parallel prototypes instead of documents. Roles are collapsing: designers code, engineers design, and job titles matter less than actual activities. Ambrosino argues design remains difficult for AI due to subjective aesthetics, lack of feedback loops, and the need for novelty. title: Anthropic Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 解禁，将于明天在 Claude 平台全球上线
content: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 will launch globally tomorrow after the U.S. Commerce Department lifted export controls. Pro, Max, Team, and Select Enterprise users can access it with weekly usage capped at 50% through July 7. Access will also resume on AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Foundry. Anthropic will expand Mythos 5 model availability under its "Glasswing" program and develop frameworks for assessing AI jailbreak severity with major cloud partners.

title: Claude Code 被曝检测中国用户时区与身份归属
content: An open-source audit of Claude Code (v2.1.196) found it contains a hidden mechanism that checks whether a user's system is set to Shanghai or Urumqi time zones and scans for affiliation with Chinese tech companies including Baidu, Alibaba, Ant Group, ByteDance, Kuaishou, Xiaohongshu, JD.com, and Bilibili. Analysts suggest this aims to prevent Chinese AI firms from replicating its model technology through methods like model distillation, sparking debate about privacy boundaries in AI tools.

title: 苹果 CEO 与欧盟技术主管就「Siri AI」举行建设性会谈
content: Apple CEO Tim Cook and EU tech chief Henna Virkkunen held "constructive" talks on Tuesday to ease tensions over Apple's "Siri AI" technology. The meeting addressed how Apple could launch its upgraded Siri in Europe without facing millions in fines for violating EU competition rules.

title: 软银：对 Open AI 进行 100 亿美元后续投资
content: SoftBank invested an additional $10 billion in OpenAI on July 1 through its Vision Fund 2, with plans for a third $10 billion investment on October 1. The Japanese conglomerate continues expanding its financial commitment to the artificial intelligence company.

title: 微软计划进行新一轮裁员，将影响到数千个岗位
content: Microsoft plans to announce thousands of layoffs, affecting sales, consulting, and Xbox gaming positions. The cuts will represent less than 2.5% of its 220,000 employees, smaller than a similar reduction last year. Some affected staff will be offered immediate new roles. The announcement is expected next week, though timing may change. The move reflects Microsoft's efforts to control costs while increasing artificial intelligence investments.

title: Anthropic 推出 Claude Science AI 科研工作台
content: Anthropic launched Claude Science, an AI workspace for scientists built on its Claude models. The platform features a coordination agent with 60+ skills spanning genomics and other fields, specialized agents, and an independent review agent that verifies citations and calculations. Outputs include traceable data visualizations with code and full history. It runs on local lab infrastructure or remote servers, scaling from single GPUs to hundreds, addressing data privacy concerns. The system integrates with NVIDIA's Evo 2 model and 60+ scientific databases. Early users report accelerated research, including faster literature reviews and drug target screening. Beta access is available for Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise users on macOS and Linux, with discounted seats for academic and nonprofit labs and API credits for select projects.

title: 无方向盘、无踏板，特斯拉 Cybercab 量产版启动公开道路工程测试
content: Tesla has begun engineering tests of its production Cybercab on public roads in Austin, Texas. The two-seat vehicle has no steering wheel or pedals and was designed exclusively for autonomous driving. Each of the 34 test vehicles carries a safety monitor. The tests, which are not open to the public, aim to validate production hardware reliability. The production model reached road testing about 20 months after the concept was unveiled in October 2024.

title: 优必选发布超仿生机器人：U1 Ultra 男版 99 万，女版 88 万 订单破万
content: Ubtech announced that its UWorld U1 humanoid robot has received over 13,361 orders and aims to deliver them this year. The U1 Ultra—priced at 990,000 yuan for the male version and 880,000 yuan for the female version—is currently the only full-size hyper-bionic humanoid robot with mass production capability. CEO Zhou Jian also unveiled the company's "human-machine symbiosis strategy," signaling the robot's transition from industrial to consumer applications.

title: 苹果供应链最严重的一次泄露，泄的不是新 iPhone 长什么样
content: A ransomware group leaked 630GB of Apple supply-chain data from a Tata factory in India, including iPhone 18 Pro motherboard designs, A20 chip specs, and detailed supplier lists. Apple used DMCA takedowns to remove surface-level videos quickly but cannot retrieve files already on the dark web. The exposé reveals Apple's critical supplier dependencies—information it guards fiercely for negotiating leverage. The breach highlights security risks in India's rapidly expanded manufacturing role, where four years of growth may have compressed decades of security maturation, creating vulnerabilities that diversification was meant to reduce.

title: 全球离婚地理学 | 原文
content: "Global Divorce Geography" explains how jurisdiction dramatically affects divorce outcomes. Vladimir Potanin exemplifies this: his 2014 Russian divorce awarded his ex-wife $41.5 million (under 1% of assets), so she refiled in London seeking 50% ($6 billion). The article examines how different countries' courts vary in speed, asset division rules, and enforcement power, making location strategically crucial for high-net-worth divorces.

title: 最容易把人逼疯的婚姻状态：它排第一 | 原文
content: A woman initially valued her husband's quick apologies, but later realized he never truly understood her feelings. When she tried to revisit issues, he dismissed her as dwelling on the past. This pattern, called "false reconciliation," appears harmonious but actually blocks emotional communication. The material identifies this as the most frustrating marital dynamic, where superficial peace masks unresolved conflicts and leaves partners feeling emotionally trapped.
